name: Condo Window Reschedule With Tight Access Rules
description: A terse condo resident needs to move an installation appointment because the building only allows contractor access during a narrow weekday window. The agent should efficiently gather the scheduling constraints and confirm a workable next step without unnecessary escalation.
initialMessage: Need to move my install. Condo only allows vendors Tue-Thu 10 to 2. What can you do?
expectedOutcome: The agent identifies this as a scheduling request, captures the access-window constraint, and proposes or confirms a rescheduling path within the permitted time range.
expectedMilestones: Alternative appointment window proposed or confirmed
